flavorText: Archfey warlocks wield glamour, trickery, and fear granted by capricious fey powers.

features.description: You add spells to your warlock list: 1st (Faerie Fire, Sleep), 3rd (Calm Emotions, Phantasmal Force), 5th (Blink, Plant Growth), 7th (Dominate Beast, Greater Invisibility), 9th (Dominate Person, Seeming).
As an action, creatures in a 10-foot cube make a Wisdom save or are charmed or frightened (your choice) until end of your next turn. Usable once per short rest.
When you take damage, use your reaction to turn invisible and teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. Usable once per long rest.
You are immune to being charmed, and when a creature attempts to charm you, you can reflect the charm back onto it for up to 1 minute (Wisdom save negates).
As an action, force one creature to make a save or be charmed or frightened in a dreamlike realm for up to 1 minute. Usable once per long rest.

archfey-expanded-spells.summary: Your patron adds elusive, manipulative, and illusion-adjacent spells that suit fey power.
archfey-expanded-spells.description: Expanded Spells should tell the player that this patron leans toward charm, displacement, confusion, and battlefield distortion rather than brute force.

archfey-fey-presence.summary: Project beguiling or terrifying fey force to disrupt nearby creatures in a burst.
archfey-fey-presence.description: Fey Presence is the subclass’s immediate social-combat crossover button: charming or frightening creatures by sheer supernatural presence.

archfey-misty-escape.summary: Slip away in a burst of glamour when hurt, denying enemies a clean follow-up.
archfey-misty-escape.description: Misty Escape makes the subclass feel slippery and irritating to pin down, which is exactly right for an Archfey pact.

archfey-beguiling-defenses.summary: The magic that twists minds has a harder time taking hold of you and can be turned back outward.
archfey-beguiling-defenses.description: Beguiling Defenses reinforces the subclass as a creature of glamour rather than a victim of it.

archfey-dark-delirium.summary: Trap a target inside a private nightmare-glamour and dominate the psychological terms of the encounter.
archfey-dark-delirium.description: Dark Delirium is a capstone-style control feature that should feel eerie, isolating, and distinctly fey rather than just another generic debuff.
